sqlMap.insert: insert into CityLW(CountyKey CityDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#CountyKey:NUMERIC# #CityDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('CityLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select CityKey, CityDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CountyKey from CityLW where CityKey = #CityKey# and CountyKey = #CountyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update CityLW set
CityDesc = #CityDesc# CityDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where CityKey = #CityKey# and CountyKey = #CountyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from CityLW where CityKey = #CityKey# and CountyKey = #CountyKey#
sqlMap.select: select CityKey, CityDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CountyKey from CityLW where CityKey = #CityKey# and CountyKey = #CountyKey#
select CityKey, CountyKey, CityDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from CityLW where CountyKey = #CountyKey#
select CityKey,CityDesc,CountyKey from CityLW where CountyKey in (select CountyKey from CountyLW where CountyDesc = #CountyDesc# and StateCode=#StateCode#) order by CityDesc asc
